revision.comment: Bot: migrate talk page structure; import discussion seed (ja:白山神社 (新潟市中央区一番堀通町)); add local discussion section + dated import note
revision.text:
{{talk page header}}
<!-- This talk page covers the main article and all associated namespace layers --> <!-- Imported from Japanese/English/Simple English Wikipedia talk pages on 2026-02-26 (UTC) when available. -->
== Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:50, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Add local discussion below this line. -->
== Imported from Japanese Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/96422034 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:50, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Source: ja:Talk:白山神社 (新潟市中央区一番堀通町) | revid=96422034 --> {{削除依頼ログ |talk=false |result1=削除|page1=白山神社 (新潟市)|date1=2006年4月10日 }} == 改名提案 == <nowiki>[[白山神社 (新潟市中央区一番堀通町)]]</nowiki>への改名を提案します。中央区沼垂東にも白山神社が鎮座してしており（参考『神社名鑑』神社本庁刊、昭和38年）、一意でないためです。--[[利用者:胡亂堂|胡亂堂]] 2011年12月24日 (土) 00:46 (UTC) *改名しました。--[[利用者:胡亂堂|胡亂堂]] 2012年1月4日 (水) 11:26 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:50, 26 February 2026 (UTC)

{{talk page header}}
<!-- This talk page covers the main article and all associated namespace layers --> <!-- Imported from Japanese/English/Simple English Wikipedia talk pages on 2026-02-26 (UTC) when available. -->
== Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:50, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Add local discussion below this line. -->
== Imported from Japanese Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/96422034 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:50, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Source: ja:Talk:白山神社 (新潟市中央区一番堀通町) | revid=96422034 --> {{削除依頼ログ |talk=false |result1=削除|page1=白山神社 (新潟市)|date1=2006年4月10日 }} == 改名提案 == <nowiki>[[白山神社 (新潟市中央区一番堀通町)]]</nowiki>への改名を提案します。中央区沼垂東にも白山神社が鎮座してしており（参考『神社名鑑』神社本庁刊、昭和38年）、一意でないためです。--[[User:胡亂堂|胡亂堂]] 2011年12月24日 (土) 00:46 (UTC) *改名しました。--[[User:胡亂堂|胡亂堂]] 2012年1月4日 (水) 11:26 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:50, 26 February 2026 (UTC)

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Hakusan_Shrine here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Hakusan_Shrine for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{talk page header}}
<!-- This talk page covers the main article and all associated namespace layers --> <!-- Imported from Japanese/English/Simple English Wikipedia talk pages on 2026-02-26 (UTC) when available. -->
== Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:50, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Add local discussion below this line. -->
== Imported from Japanese Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/96422034 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:50, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Source: ja:Talk:白山神社 (新潟市中央区一番堀通町) | revid=96422034 --> {{削除依頼ログ |talk=false |result1=削除|page1=白山神社 (新潟市)|date1=2006年4月10日 }} == 改名提案 == <nowiki>[[白山神社 (新潟市中央区一番堀通町)]]</nowiki>への改名を提案します。中央区沼垂東にも白山神社が鎮座してしており（参考『神社名鑑』神社本庁刊、昭和38年）、一意でないためです。--[[User:胡亂堂|胡亂堂]] 2011年12月24日 (土) 00:46 (UTC) *改名しました。--[[User:胡亂堂|胡亂堂]] 2012年1月4日 (水) 11:26 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:50, 26 February 2026 (UTC)
